description: ## Component: hx-progress-bar (NEW) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries** Linear progress indicator showing completion percentage or indeterminate loading state. ### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic) Properties control value and visual state. Optional label slot. ### API Design **Properties:** `value` (0-100), `max` (default 100), `indeterminate` (boolean — no known progress), `variant` (primary|success|warning|danger), `label` (accessible label), `show-value` (boolean) **Slots:** `label` (custom label content) **CSS Parts:** `bar`, `track`, `fill`, `label`, `value` ### Drupal Integration ```twig {# Form completion progress #} Intake Progress {# File upload progress #} ``` ### Healthcare: Form completion tracking, file upload progress, care plan milestones ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Determinate mode shows fill based on value/max 2. Indeterminate mode shows animated loading bar 3. Value display (percentage or custom) 4. WCAG 2.1 AA: progressbar role, aria-valuenow/min/max 5. Smooth fill animation on value change
title: T1-25: hx-progress-bar — Linear Progress Indicator
